name: Chipotle Chutney Dressing (Gourmet)
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon canned chipotle chili in adobo sauce, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. For a chunky dressing, combine all ingredients in a container and shake well.
2. For a smooth salad dressing, blend the ingredients in a small food processor until uniform.
3. Transfer to a non-metal container and refrigerate for up to 7-10 days.
4. Serve with lettuce, potatoes, melons, or apples.
